notes: Binary concat coerces number to text.
Binary concat coerces logical to text.
Text equality is case-insensitive on the admitted slice.
Direct comparison does not numeric-coerce text.
Blank direct cell compares equal to zero.
Blank direct cell compares equal to empty text.
Logical compares above number on the admitted slice.
Concat broadcasts row-vs-column inputs as a 2-D grid.
Comparison broadcasts row-vs-column inputs as a 2-D grid.
